description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a low, gray concrete block fence enclosing a green lawn. The house features a prominent red gable roof with two tiers, the upper story set back from the lower, and beige exterior walls. Large rectangular blue-tinted windows are present on the front and rear facades, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is located at the front, marked by a brown door with a small overhang and a short path leading to the gate. A small humanoid figure stands near the entrance, suggesting the scale of the structure. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on symmetry and clean lines.
description: A beige two-story house with a red gable roof, large blue windows, and a surrounding gray block fence enclosing a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large front windows, and a humanoid figure by the door.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the side of the house, the fence, and the figure near the back corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Right side view with large windows and the figure near the open section of the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a small overhang, short path, and no porch or columns
